blended.narrative: Canyon Ski Resort is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 16°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
